title: rosa pomifera subsp. omissa
intro: Rosa pomifera subsp. omissa, also known as the Chinese rose or the Chinese hawthorn, is a subspecies of the Rosa pomifera plant, a type of rose species native to China. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rosa pomifera subsp. omissa include its potential to reduce cholesterol levels, prevent cardiovascular disease, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Rosa pomifera subsp. omissa can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as tea, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
